extensionDescription.message: Isixhobo sokuthelekisa esilula ngaphandle kwe-intanethi sesicatshulwa kunye nekhowudi.
extensionDescription.description: Description shown in the Chrome Web Store

headerSubtitle.message: Thelekisa umbhalo, ikhowudi, i-JSON, kunye nokunye - ngaphandle kweintanethi

placeholderOriginal.message: Ncamathelisa umbhalo wokuqala okanye ikhowudi apha...

placeholderModified.message: Ncamathelisa umbhalo olungisiweyo okanye ikhowudi apha...

emptyStateBody.message: Ncamathelisa okubhaliweyo kwiiphaneli zombini uze ucofe Thelekisa — okanye ucinezele Ctrl+Enter

identicalBody.message: Akukho mahluko ufunyenweyo phakathi kwamagalelo amabini.

errorLargeInput.message: Igalelo likhulu kakhulu. I-Diff ingathatha umzuzwana...

errorBothEmpty.message: Nceda uncamathisele umxholo kuzo zombini iiphaneli phambi kokuthelekisa.

errorOneEmpty.message: Iphaneli enye ayinanto. Nceda unikeze umxholo kuzo zombini iiphaneli.

formatJSONError.message: I-JSON engasebenziyo kwiphaneli enye okanye zombini.
